notes: Clean foundational file: no sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides. The one proof over 30 lines (ord_P_algebraMap_F_of_ne_zero) navigates the F → CoordinateRing → FunctionField scalar tower carefully. About half the declarations are unused within this file but are public API consumed by downstream files (GaloisAction, ProjectiveDivisor, AlgebraicNonNegOrd, WeilPairing/Constancy); Pic and Pic₀ are definition stubs with T-II-3-009 (principal divisors have degree 0) still pending.
